content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Persona Talent: Virtual Assistant Anywhere in the World Tennessee All Other Remote Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5413/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Miami, Florida, USA <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://www.personatalent.com">https://www.personatalent.com</a> </p> <h2>Role Summary</h2> <p>We are hiring Virtual Assistants to help our clients run and grow their businesses. The Virtual Assistant role is flexible and varied, often blending business support with light personal/executive support across multiple workstreams. Ideal for early-career candidates who are tech-fluent, adaptable, and ready to grow with a single client over time.</p> <p><strong>&nbsp;</strong></p> <h2>Key Responsibilities</h2> <ul> <li> <p>Draft, send, and triage business emails and routine communications</p> </li> <li> <p>Take video conferences; capture and distribute notes and action items</p> </li> <li> <p>Interface with clients, vendors, and external partners professionally</p> </li> <li> <p>Manage calendars and schedule meetings across time zones</p> </li> <li> <p>Conduct online research and assemble findings into clean spreadsheets</p> </li> <li> <p>Prepare basic reports, decks, and analyses</p> </li> <li> <p>Handle creative work as needed: light writing, formatting, simple media coordination</p> </li> <li> <p>Provide light personal and executive support (errands coordination, travel research, reminders)</p> </li> <li> <p>Take on miscellaneous administrative tasks and special projects</p> </li> </ul> <p><strong>&nbsp;</strong></p> <h2>Required Qualifications</h2> <ul> <li> <p>Fully fluent in English</p> </li> <li> <p>Skilled in modern productivity apps and quick to learn new tools</p> </li> <li> <p>Strong written communication and detail orientation</p> </li> <li> <p>Ability to commit long-term and full-time</p> </li> <li> <p>Ability to work U.S. business hours (PT, CT, or ET)</p> </li> <li> <p>No prior work experience is required, but any relevant experience is an advantage</p> </li> </ul> <p><strong>&nbsp;</strong></p> <h2>Preferred Qualifications</h2> <ul> <li> <p>Associate's or Bachelor's degree in any field</p> </li> <li> <p>Prior virtual assistant or remote-support experience</p> </li> <li> <p>Comfortable with both business and light personal support tasks</p> </li> </ul> <p><strong>&nbsp;</strong></p> <h2>Tools &amp; Technologies</h2> <ul> <li> <p>Google Workspace, Microsoft Office, Calendly, Notion, Asana, Slack, Zoom, Loom, basic CRM exposure (HubSpot, Salesforce)</p> </li> </ul> <p><strong>&nbsp;</strong></p> <h2>Core Competencies</h2> <ul> <li> <p>Track record of success at work or in school</p> </li> <li> <p>Solves problems with minimal guidance</p> </li> <li> <p>Anticipates teammates' needs</p> </li> <li> <p>Hard worker with perseverance</p> </li> <li> <p>Curious and resourceful</p> </li> <li> <p>Professional</p> </li> </ul> <p><strong>&nbsp;</strong></p> <h2>What We Offer</h2> <ul> <li> <p>Best salaries in the industry</p> </li> <li> <p>Work from anywhere permanently</p> </li> <li> <p>Opportunities for growth and advancement</p> </li> <li> <p>A fast-paced and collaborative environment</p> </li> <li> <p>A warm, people-first company culture</p> </li> <li> <p>Get paid in your currency of choice</p> </li> <li> <p>Full benefits</p> </li> </ul> <p><strong>&nbsp;</strong></p> <p>This is a full-time, long-term role, dedicated exclusively to one of our clients. All roles at Persona are 100% work-from-anywhere.</p> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/persona-talent-virtual-assistant">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/persona-talent-virtual-assistant</a></p> Fri, 05 Jun 2026 15:37:38 +0000 Sun, 05 Jul 2026 15:37:38 +0000 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/persona-talent-virtual-assistant https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/persona-talent-virtual-assistant sofatutor GmbH: CRO Specialist (all genders) Anywhere in the World 🇦🇹 Austria, 🇨🇭 Switzerland, 🇨🇿 Czechia, 🇩🇪 Germany, 🇩🇰 Denmark, 🇪🇸 Spain, 🇫🇷 France, 🇬🇧 United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland, 🇬🇷 Greece, 🇭🇷 Croatia, 🇮🇪 Ireland, 🇮🇹 Italy, 🇳🇱 Netherlands, 🇳🇴 Norway, 🇵🇱 Poland, 🇵🇹 Portugal, 🇸🇪 Sweden, and 🇸🇰 Slovakia Berlin A/B Testing and Figma Design Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5423/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Berlin <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://jobs.sofatutor.com/">https://jobs.sofatutor.com/</a> </p> <div class="sc-1fwbcuw-0 dzeKPx"><div><p>Design and run A/B tests that directly impact subscription growth for one of Europe's leading EdTech platforms – 1M+ users, real experiments, measurable results.</p><p><br></p><p>We’re looking for a&nbsp;<strong>Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO) Specialist (gn)</strong>&nbsp;to join our Product Growth Team and help drive one of sofatutor’s most important goals: turning more parents into customers who trust us to support their children’s learning journey. In this role, your work will have a direct and measurable impact on the company’s success. By designing and running smart, strategic A/B tests, you’ll help increase user acquisition, activation, and retention across our subscription-based learning products. You’ll collaborate closely with designers, developers, data analysts, and senior leadership to uncover high-potential growth opportunities and turn insights into real results.</p><p><br>&nbsp;<strong>100% remote (EMEA)&nbsp;</strong>| ⏳&nbsp;<strong>32-40h/week</strong></p><p><br></p><h3>Your Tasks:</h3><ul><li><p><strong>Define and implement growth experiments across the funnel —</strong>&nbsp;from hypothesis to launch and evaluation.</p></li><li><p><strong>Maintain a clear pipeline of experiments</strong>&nbsp;based on impact, effort, and learning value.</p></li><li><p><strong>Collaborate closely with design, engineering</strong>, and key&nbsp;<strong>stakeholders</strong>&nbsp;to translate testing concepts into high-quality experi
